title: Improving Livelihoods through Sustainable Resource Management in Micro-watersheds – Tata-ICRISAT-ICAR-BAIF Project
abstract: Rainfed areas of the dry agro-ecosystem of Madhya Pradesh (M.P) and eastern Rajasthan are characterized by erratic and low rainfall (600-1100mm), frequent droughts, soil with moisture storage capacity(100-200mm)……….
